subject: [PATCH 11/24] nfsd: use RCU to protect fi_deleg_file

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds RCU (Read-Copy Update) protection to the fi_deleg_file pointer in the nfsd kernel module. The patch annotates the pointer with __rcu and converts all accessors to use proper RCU primitives, such as rcu_assign_pointer() and rcu_dereference_protected(). This change is necessary because concurrent accesses from workqueue callbacks can dereference a NULL pointer if they race with delegation teardown. The patch prepares for a subsequent change that will safely acquire a reference from the CB_NOTIFY callback path without holding the fi_lock lock.
